author: Codex
scope: Codex-only preparation for remaining duplicate_global_identity cleanup after identity222, focused on Metro-North / NYCT / MTA sibling-agency collisions. No provider-backed commands, materialize, validate, export, canonical/generated output edits, DB edits, override edits, wiki edits, or LOG edits were performed.

messages: Global entity records entity_meeting-doc-124881-mnr and entity_metro-north-railroad share identity key entity_metro-north-railroad.
Global entity records entity_meeting-doc-124881-mnr and entity_metro-north-railroad share identity key entity_metro-north-railroad-mnr.
Global entity records entity_meeting-doc-124881-mnr and entity_metro-north-railroad share identity key entity_mnr.
Global entity records entity_meeting-doc-124881-mnr and entity_metro-north-railroad share identity key entity_mta-metro-north-railroad.

source_canonical_evidence.quote: the MTA is comprised of the following... Metro-North Commuter Railroad Company
Metro-North Railroad Committee

proposed_durable_decisions.reason: Both records represent the Metro-North Railroad agency. The meeting-doc record is a source-specific agency record, while the target is the canonical Metro-North Railroad agency record.
proposed_durable_decisions.guard_notes: Alias only the agency record into the agency target; do not absorb Metro-North committee records or source-specific 'Metro-North Connection' records through this alias.

messages: Global entity records entity_meeting-doc-128981-nyct and entity_mta-nyct share identity key entity_mta-new-york-city-transit.
Global entity records entity_meeting-doc-128981-nyct and entity_mta-nyct share identity key entity_mta-new-york-city-transit-authority.
Global entity records entity_meeting-doc-128981-nyct and entity_mta-nyct share identity key entity_new-york-city-transit-authority-nyct.
Global entity records entity_meeting-doc-128981-nyct and entity_mta-nyct share identity key entity_nyc-transit.

source_canonical_evidence.quote: Due to New York City Transit Authority
MTA New York City Transit (NYCT)

proposed_durable_decisions.reason: Both records refer to the New York City Transit / NYCT agency identity. Shared plain MTA keys are contaminated, but the NYCT-specific keys and names support an agency alias.
proposed_durable_decisions.guard_notes: Do not use this alias to merge NYCT with MTA Bus Company, Department of Buses, MTA parent, MTAHQ, MTA Real Estate, or MTA Bridges and Tunnels.

validator_evidence.message: Global entity records entity_meeting-doc-102746-committee and entity_meeting-doc-128981-nyct share identity key entity_metro-north-commuter-railroad-company.

source_canonical_evidence.display_name: Committee on the Operations of the Metro-North Commuter Railroad
source_canonical_evidence.quote: Committee on the Operations of the Metro-North Commuter Railroad
Due to New York City Transit Authority

proposed_durable_decisions.reason: A Metro-North operations committee and the NYCT agency are distinct entities; the shared Metro-North key is cross-record contamination.
proposed_durable_decisions.guard_notes: Preserve committee-vs-agency separation and sibling-agency separation even when meeting books include multiple MTA operating agencies.

validator_evidence.message: Global entity records entity_meeting-doc-102746-committee and entity_metro-north-railroad share identity key entity_metro-north-commuter-railroad-company.

source_canonical_evidence.display_name: Committee on the Operations of the Metro-North Commuter Railroad
source_canonical_evidence.quote: Committee on the Operations of the Metro-North Commuter Railroad
Metro-North Railroad Committee

proposed_durable_decisions.reason: The committee oversees or handles Metro-North operations context but is not the Metro-North Railroad agency itself.
proposed_durable_decisions.guard_notes: Represent committee-to-agency connections with relations, not identity merges.

messages: Global entity records entity_meeting-doc-102746-committee and entity_mta-metro-north-2015-webster-map share identity key entity_metro-north-commuter-railroad-company.
Global entity records entity_meeting-doc-102746-committee and entity_mta-metro-north-2015-webster-map share identity key entity_metro-north-commuter-railroad-company-metro-north.

source_canonical_evidence.display_name: Committee on the Operations of the Metro-North Commuter Railroad
source_canonical_evidence.quote: Committee on the Operations of the Metro-North Commuter Railroad
Metro-North Connection

proposed_durable_decisions.reason: A Metro-North operations committee is not a Webster Avenue 'Metro-North Connection' reference; shared Metro-North agency keys are too broad for identity.
proposed_durable_decisions.guard_notes: Keep source-specific connection/map records out of committee clusters unless a later review proves the record is purely an agency alias.

messages: Global entity records entity_meeting-doc-124881-mnr and entity_mta-metro-north-2015-webster-map share identity key entity_metro-north.
Global entity records entity_meeting-doc-124881-mnr and entity_mta-metro-north-2015-webster-map share identity key entity_metro-north-railroad.
Global entity records entity_meeting-doc-124881-mnr and entity_mta-metro-north-2015-webster-map share identity key entity_mta-metro-north-railroad.

source_canonical_evidence.quote: Metro-North Commuter Railroad Company
Metro-North Connection

proposed_durable_decisions.reason: The first record is the Metro-North Railroad agency; the second is a 2015 Webster source-specific Metro-North connection/reference record. The overlap is likely broad agency-key contamination rather than exact identity.
proposed_durable_decisions.guard_notes: Prefer DNM until the connection/map record is manually reclassified or explicitly proven to be the agency record.

messages: Global entity records entity_meeting-doc-124881-mnr and entity_mta-entity-update-2025 share identity key entity_metro-north-railroad.
Global entity records entity_meeting-doc-124881-mnr and entity_mta-entity-update-2025 share identity key entity_metro-north-railroad-mnr.

source_canonical_evidence.quote: Metro-North Commuter Railroad Company
Buses are a critical transportation option for New Yorkers...

proposed_durable_decisions.reason: Metro-North Railroad is an operating agency/subsidiary context within MTA; it is not the parent Metropolitan Transportation Authority record.
proposed_durable_decisions.guard_notes: Keep subsidiary/operator agencies separate from parent-MTA records; use relations for organizational hierarchy.

validator_evidence.message: Global entity records entity_meeting-doc-128981-nyct and entity_mta-bridges-and-tunnels share identity key entity_mta.

source_canonical_evidence.quote: Due to New York City Transit Authority
MTA Bridges and Tunnels

proposed_durable_decisions.reason: NYCT and MTA Bridges and Tunnels are distinct MTA agencies; the shared 'entity_mta' key is a parent acronym collision.
proposed_durable_decisions.guard_notes: Do not merge sibling agencies on the bare MTA acronym.

validator_evidence.message: Global entity records entity_meeting-doc-128981-nyct and entity_mta-metropolitan-transportation-authority share identity key entity_mta.

source_canonical_evidence.quote: Due to New York City Transit Authority
Exhibit Book Finance Committee Meeting

proposed_durable_decisions.reason: NYCT is not the parent Metropolitan Transportation Authority. The shared key is only the broad MTA acronym.
proposed_durable_decisions.guard_notes: Parent MTA and NYCT should remain separate even where documents use MTA as umbrella branding.

validator_evidence.message: Global entity records entity_meeting-doc-128981-nyct and entity_mta-overall share identity key entity_mta.

source_canonical_evidence.quote: Due to New York City Transit Authority
The Metropolitan Transportation Authority ("MTA" or "MTA Group") was established under the New York Public Authorities Law

proposed_durable_decisions.reason: NYCT is an operating agency, while entity_mta-overall is the umbrella public benefit corporation.
proposed_durable_decisions.guard_notes: Keep parent/umbrella corporate identity separate from component agency records.

validator_evidence.message: Global entity records entity_meeting-doc-128981-nyct and entity_mta-real-estate share identity key entity_mta.

source_canonical_evidence.quote: Due to New York City Transit Authority
MTA Real Estate will provide an annual report on leasing and construction opportunities

proposed_durable_decisions.reason: NYCT and MTA Real Estate are distinct organizational entities; sharing the umbrella MTA acronym is not identity.
proposed_durable_decisions.guard_notes: Do not merge operating agencies with MTA departments or business units on broad parent acronyms.

validator_evidence.message: Global entity records entity_mta-bus-company and entity_mta-nyct share identity key entity_mta-bus-woodhaven-workshop2.

source_canonical_evidence.quote: Two divisions within the MTA are responsible for managing these routes. New York City Bus, a division of New York City Transit...
MTA New York City Transit (NYCT)

proposed_durable_decisions.reason: MTA Bus Company and NYCT are separate MTA bus-operating entities/divisions in the evidence. The shared Woodhaven workshop key is source-specific contamination, not exact identity.
proposed_durable_decisions.guard_notes: Keep MTA Bus Company distinct from NYCT/New York City Bus; represent shared bus-network work with project/source relations.

skipped_review_only.reason: High-confidence DNM but already prepared as identity222-early-entity-008; not repeated as a durable decision in identity223.

High-confidence DNM but already prepared as identity222-mta-parent-011; not repeated as a durable decision in identity223.
High-confidence department-vs-agency DNM but already prepared as identity222-early-entity-004.
Low confidence as an alias because current evidence labels the source-specific record 'Metro-North Connection'; prepared DNMs around it instead.

commands_run: pwd && rg --files data/review_notes data/canonical data/materialized wiki raw | head -200
ls -la data/review_notes && rg -n "identity222|identity221|duplicate_global_identity|alias_merge|do_not_merge|skipped_review_only" data/review_notes data/materialized data/canonical | head -200

jq -r '.proposed_durable_decisions[] | select((.record_ids // [ .alias, .target ]) as $ids | ($ids|index("entity_meeting-doc-128981-nyct")) or ($ids|index("entity_meeting-doc-124881-mnr")) or ($ids|index("entity_meeting-doc-102746-committee")) or ($ids|index("entity_mta-bus-company")) or ($ids|index("entity_mta-nyct"))) | [.decision_id,.decision_type,((.record_ids // [ .alias, .target ])|join(" <> "))] | @tsv' data/review_notes/codex-identity-batch222-*.json data/review_notes/codex-identity-batch221-*.json
